deck.title: Kannada Basics
deck.description: Comprehensive Kannada foundation: greetings, grammar, numbers, family, food, travel, verbs, phrases, and culture. Front shows Kannada with romanization; back shows English.

lessons.description: Meeting people and talking about yourself
